allow: Bash(APP_SECRET_KEY=test ADMIN_USERNAME=admin ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin PORT=18099 node src/server.js)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18099/v1/messages -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-gw-invalid' -d '{"model":"test","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}')
Bash(APP_SECRET_KEY=test ADMIN_USERNAME=admin ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin PORT=18099 timeout 5 node src/server.js)
Bash(APP_SECRET_KEY=test ADMIN_USERNAME=admin ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin PORT=18099 timeout 4 node src/server.js)
